passiveAbilities.name: Weakling
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -1. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy.

passiveAbilities.name: Enchanted Dagger
passiveAbilities.description: All Melee Dmg generated by this model count as Magical instead of the listed Dmg type.

passiveAbilities.name: For the Good of the Glade
passiveAbilities.description: If this character uses an Arcane Ability, before drawing Arcane Cards, you may inflict 1 Wd on up to three different friendly Faerie within 6". For each Wd inflicted, draw 2 additional cards.

arcaneAbilities.name: Feed on Fear
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target loses X energy. Then distribute that much energy amongst Faerie(s) within 6" of the target.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Horrifying Visions
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X+1 Magical Dmg.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 3 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Dance with Death
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If this character is not slain, it may move 2". If this character is slain, the enemy suffers 2 Wds.
